name: Mustikkapiiras (Blueberry Yogurt Pie)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F (175°C).
2. Butter and flour a 9 or 10 inch pie pan.
3. Cream the butter and sugar in a bowl until smooth.
4. Add the egg and mix well.
5. Combine the flour and baking powder with the wet ingredients to form a soft dough.
6. Dust your fingers with flour, pat the dough into the bottom of the prepared pie pan, and press it up the sides.
7. Refrigerate at least 30 minutes before making the filling.
8. Mix the filling ingredients (except blueberries) until smooth.
9. Arrange the berries in the pie shell.
10. Pour the filling over the berries to coat them evenly.
11. Bake for 50 - 60 minutes, or until the crust is golden brown and the custard sets.
12. Let it chill well before serving.
